question: How to generate invoice in BUSY
answer: Go to Transactions > Sales > Sales Invoice
column4: fill in item details and party name
column5: then click Save to generate the invoice.

question: How to take data backup in BUSY
How to file GST return in BUSY
answer: Go to Reports > GST Reports > GSTR-1
column4: generate the report for the period
column5: and export it in JSON format for filing on the GST portal.

question: How to create a new ledger account in BUSY
answer: Go to Masters > Accounts > Account Master > Add

question: How to add a new item in inventory
answer: Go to Masters > Inventory > Item > Add

question: How to record a payment voucher
How to record a receipt voucher
How to view profit and loss report
answer: Go to Reports > Financial Reports > Profit & Loss Account to view the summary for the selected period.

question: How to create a new company in BUSY
answer: Go to Administration > Company/Data > Company Info > Add New Company

question: How to enable multi-user mode in BUSY
answer: Go to Administration > Configuration > Features/Options and enable the Multi-User option
